summary: First test cycle for CodeMaster Academy MVP. Backend: 25/25 pytest cases PASS (auth, languages, courses, lessons, quizzes, exercises, paths/projects, progress, leaderboard, badges, referral, certificates, tutor GPT-5.2, plans, mock checkout, admin stats/users/RBAC). Frontend: All major mobile screens render correctly on 390x844 viewport - splash, login, home dashboard, languages (17 cards, 3 Disponibile / 14 Coming soon), Python language detail (4 levels, lessons/quiz/exercises), lesson view with code block + Completa lezione, quiz with options + Avanti, exercise with editor + Invia, AI Tutor (chips fill input + send icon returns real GPT-5.2 reply), profile with badges & language chips, pricing 4 plans, leaderboard podium + ranked list with user position, referral code share, certificates empty state, admin dashboard (stats grid + users list) and access-denied screen for non-admin.

ui_bugs.issue: Tapping a suggestion chip only fills the input field - it does NOT auto-send. User must tap the send icon afterward. Common UX pattern is auto-send on chip tap.
Markdown reply from GPT-5.2 (code fences ```js, **bold**, headings ###) is displayed as raw text instead of rendered markdown. Consider react-native-markdown-display.

issues: Expo deprecation warnings in console: 'shadow*' style props deprecated, use boxShadow (cosmetic, not blocking)
Package version mismatch warnings: @react-native-async-storage/async-storage@3.0.2 vs expected 2.2.0 and expo-secure-store@55.0.13 vs expected ~15.0.8 (no functional impact observed)

react_native_issues.issue: Header title 'Accedi' and submit button 'Accedi' share identical text with no testID. Both elements are picked up by get_by_text. Add testID='login-submit' on TouchableOpacity to make selectors unambiguous.
Buttons (TouchableOpacity) lack testID props app-wide. Add testIDs on critical interactions (login-submit, lesson-complete, quiz-submit, tutor-send, etc.) for reliable automated testing.

action_items: (Optional UX) Auto-send AI Tutor message when a suggestion chip is tapped (currently only fills input).
(Optional UX) Render assistant markdown replies with a markdown component instead of plain Text so code blocks and headings format properly.
(Optional polish) Add testID props to interactive components (TouchableOpacity/Pressable) across screens to enable robust automated testing - none are required for functionality.
(Optional polish) Replace deprecated shadow* style props with boxShadow to silence RN web warnings and align package versions per Expo doctor.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~1035 lines - approaching the 700-line guideline. Consider splitting into routers (auth, courses, tutor, admin, billing).
Mock checkout updates user.subscription with is_mock=true (clearly flagged - good).
All endpoints exclude MongoDB _id correctly via projection or clean_doc.
JWT auth wired via get_current_user_payload / get_current_admin_payload dependencies; admin endpoint returns 401/403 for non-admin (verified).
seed_data_creation: Created one TEST_user via /api/auth/register during test_register_and_login. Demo and admin users seeded by backend startup. No manual seeding required.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (note the PUBLIC suffix), not EXPO_BACKEND_URL. Login form has duplicate 'Accedi' text (heading + button); use accedi[1] (the second match) when clicking the button via get_by_text. Tutor suggestion chips fill input only - need to tap send icon (around x=360,y=750 on 390x844 viewport) to actually submit. Demo user XP grows when tests run lessons/exercises (not 320 anymore).
rca_of_issue: No blocking issues found. All requested features in the review request are functional end-to-end.
